✦ Exclusive B2B Invitation ✦

Carry the World's
Finest Embroidery

in your boutique, atelier, or retail space.

Daroodi is opening its trade programme to select luxury boutiques, fashion retailers, and cultural garment specialists across UK, USA, Australia, Canada, and the GCC & Arab world. If your clientele demands artisanal excellence — hand-embroidered Thobes, Abayas, and ceremonial Coats crafted over hundreds of hours — this is your invitation.

Your Exclusive Offer

{{offer}}

Download Trade Catalogue
Apply for Partnership
Where We Ship

Global Markets Served

The Daroodi Trade Advantage

✦
Exclusive SKUs for Trade

Partners receive access to private-label and exclusive embroidery designs not in our public catalogue — giving your boutique a genuinely unique offering.

⏳
4–8 Week Lead Times

Trade partners receive priority scheduling and dedicated production slots. Ready-embroidered collections ship in 7–10 days.

📦
Global Fulfilment

White-glove logistics to all 5 markets. Orders arrive garment-boxed with artisan provenance cards — retail-ready on arrival.

Your Region, Your Opportunity

Hand-embroidered garments are among the fastest-growing categories in global luxury occasion wear.

🇬🇧🇺🇸 UK & USA
Diaspora Luxury Demand

The Arab & South Asian diaspora is driving double-digit growth in handcrafted occasion wear. Wedding season demand now spans 9 months of the year.

🇦🇺🇨🇦 Australia & Canada
Cultural Fashion Rising

Multicultural retail is underserved at the luxury end. Boutiques stocking artisanal abayas and coats report near-zero competition in this segment.

🇸🇦🇦🇪 GCC & Arab Markets
Thobe Heritage Premium

In KSA, UAE, and Qatar, master-crafted Thobes with hand-embroidered detailing command a significant premium. The elite market is loyal.

🌍 Global Trend
Provenance is Luxury

Affluent consumers seek traceable, artisan-made clothing with a story. Daroodi's provenance cards support this narrative perfectly.

Personalised for You

This email was crafted for your company

We reach out to select trade partners by name because we believe great partnerships begin with personal attention. {{name}}, as a buyer or decision-maker in {{jurisdiction}}, you are seeing an offer and tier recommendation tailored specifically to your market.

Your exclusive campaign offer — {{offer}} — has been prepared with your region and boutique profile in mind.

Live Merge Variables {{name}} {{company}} {{jurisdiction}} {{offer}}
About Daroodi

Three Generations of Embroidery Mastery

Daroodi is a house of master artisans specialising in hand-embroidered garments rooted in Arabian Peninsula tradition. Founded on the principle that clothing is storytelling, every Thobe, Abaya, and ceremonial Coat is a singular work — crafted by a named artisan using techniques inherited across generations.

Our B2B programme exists for curators of excellence — partners who understand their clients' desire for the rare and the genuine. We are not seeking volume. We are seeking the right boutiques to carry these stories.

Zardozi Embroidery Bisht Craft Thobes Abayas Ceremonial Coats Global Shipping

Start Your Trade Conversation

{{name}}, our trade desk is ready to discuss how Daroodi can complement your company's collection. One conversation is all it takes.

WhatsApp Trade Desk
Enquiry Form

“We do not manufacture garments at scale.
We create singular pieces that your clients will keep for life.”

Partnership applications reviewed within 48 hours

Daroodi

Best regards,
The Outbound Team

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Daroodi · B2B Partner Programme</title>
<!--
  ══════════════════════════════════════
  MERGE VARIABLES — inject in Subject or Body
  ══════════════════════════════════════
  Ijtiba Rana         → Recipient Name (fallback: there)
  Growintek (PVT) LTD  → Company Name (fallback: your company)
  Pakistan → Country / Region (fallback: your area)
  Wholesale access.        → Campaign Offer Brief
  ══════════════════════════════════════
-->
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,600&family=Cinzel:wght@400;500;600&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
/* ══ RESET ══ */
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
img,svg{display:block}

/* ══ BODY ══ */
body{
  background:#f0e9dc;
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;
  color:#3a3020;
  min-height:100vh;
  padding:0;
  margin:0;
}

/* ══ OUTER SHELL ══ */
.shell{
  width:100%;
  max-width:680px;
  margin:0 auto;
  padding:16px 12px 48px;
  box-sizing:border-box;
}
@media(max-width:380px){
  .shell{padding:12px 8px 40px}
}

/* ══ EMAIL WRAPPER ══ */
.ew{
  width:100%;background:#f8f4ee;position:relative;
  box-shadow:0 8px 48px rgba(120,90,30,.14);overflow:hidden;
}
.ew::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  border:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.38);pointer-events:none;z-index:20;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   TOP BAR
════════════════════════════════════ */
.top-bar{
  background:#9b7b3a;padding:7px 24px;
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
  flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;
}
.top-bar-text{
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.25em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:#f8f4ee;opacity:.9;
}
.top-bar-flags{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center}
.top-bar-flags span{font-size:15px;line-height:1}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   HEADER
════════════════════════════════════ */
.hdr{
  position:relative;background:#f8f4ee;
  padding:44px 32px 36px;text-align:center;overflow:hidden;
}
.hdr::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:50%;
  transform:translateX(-50%);width:70%;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#c8a05a,transparent);
}
.corner{position:absolute;width:36px;height:36px}
.c-tl{top:12px;left:12px;border-top:1px solid #9b7b3a;border-left:1px solid #9b7b3a}
.c-tr{top:12px;right:12px;border-top:1px solid #9b7b3a;border-right:1px solid #9b7b3a}
.c-bl{bottom:12px;left:12px;border-bottom:1px solid #9b7b3a;border-left:1px solid #9b7b3a}
.c-br{bottom:12px;right:12px;border-bottom:1px solid #9b7b3a;border-right:1px solid #9b7b3a}

.arabesque{display:block;margin:0 auto 14px;opacity:.5}
.brand{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:38px;font-weight:600;
  letter-spacing:.22em;color:#9b7b3a;text-transform:uppercase;line-height:1}
.brand-tag{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-style:italic;
  font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.1em;color:#7a6a4a;margin-top:8px}
.b2b-badge{
  display:inline-block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8px;
  letter-spacing:.32em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#9b7b3a;
  border:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.38);padding:5px 16px;margin-top:14px;
  background:rgba(155,123,58,.09);
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   PERSONALISED GREETING BANNER
════════════════════════════════════ */
.greet-banner{
  background:rgba(160,120,60,.04);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.18);
  padding:16px 32px;text-align:center;
}
.greet-text{
  font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-style:italic;
  font-size:15px;color:#7a6a4a;line-height:1.6;
}
.greet-text strong{color:#9b7b3a;font-style:normal;font-weight:600}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   HERO
════════════════════════════════════ */
.hero{
  position:relative;padding:56px 32px 48px;
  text-align:center;overflow:hidden;background:#f0e9dc;
}
.hero::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='80' height='80' viewBox='0 0 80 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cg fill='none' stroke='%23c8a05a' stroke-width='0.4'%3E%3Cpath d='M40 8 L72 40 L40 72 L8 40 Z'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='40' cy='40' r='16'/%3E%3Cpath d='M40 8 L40 72 M8 40 L72 40'/%3E%3Cpath d='M40 24 L56 40 L40 56 L24 40 Z'/%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E");
  background-size:80px 80px;opacity:.06;pointer-events:none;
}
.hero-radial{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 40%,rgba(200,160,90,.08) 0%,transparent 65%);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.eyebrow{
  display:inline-block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9.5px;
  letter-spacing:.38em;color:#9b7b3a;text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:20px;position:relative;
}
.eyebrow::before,.eyebrow::after{content:'◆';font-size:6px;margin:0 9px;opacity:.5;vertical-align:middle}
.h1{
  font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(30px,6vw,50px);
  font-weight:700;line-height:1.13;color:#1c1608;margin-bottom:7px;position:relative;
}
.h1 em{font-style:italic;color:#9b7b3a}
.h1-sub{
  font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-style:italic;
  font-size:clamp(15px,3vw,20px);color:#7a6a4a;margin-bottom:26px;position:relative;
}
.div-line{width:72px;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#c8a05a,transparent);margin:0 auto 26px}
.hero-body{
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.85;color:#7a6a4a;max-width:480px;margin:0 auto 32px;position:relative;
}
.hero-body strong{color:#1c1608;font-weight:500}

/* Offer block */
.offer-block{
  background:#ffffff;border:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.38);
  border-left:3px solid #9b7b3a;padding:14px 18px;
  margin:0 auto 28px;max-width:480px;text-align:left;position:relative;
}
.offer-label{
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.3em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:#9b7b3a;margin-bottom:6px;
}
.offer-text{
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:#7a6a4a;
  line-height:1.6;font-style:italic;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   BUTTONS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.btn-row{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;position:relative}
@media(max-width:400px){
  .btn{font-size:8.5px;padding:12px 16px;letter-spacing:.18em}
  .btn-row{gap:8px}
  .top-bar{padding:7px 12px}
  .top-bar-text{font-size:7.5px;letter-spacing:.18em}
  .hdr{padding:32px 16px 28px}
  .hero{padding:40px 16px 36px}
  .sec{padding:0 12px 36px}
  .merge-block,.about,.contact,.final{margin-left:12px;margin-right:12px}
  .stats{margin:0 12px 28px}
}
.btn{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9.5px;letter-spacing:.28em;
  text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;
  padding:14px 26px;position:relative;transition:all .3s;
  white-space:nowrap;
}
.btn-p{background:#9b7b3a;color:#f8f4ee;border:1px solid #9b7b3a}
.btn-p::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:-4px;border:1px solid rgba(200,160,90,.3)}
.btn-p:hover{background:#c8a05a;border-color:#c8a05a}
.btn-o{background:transparent;color:#9b7b3a;border:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.38)}
.btn-o:hover{background:rgba(155,123,58,.09)}
.btn-wa{background:#15572f;color:#d4f0e0;border:1px solid rgba(21,87,47,.5)}
.btn-wa:hover{background:#1a6b3a}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   SECTION HEADER
════════════════════════════════════ */
.sec-hd{text-align:center;padding-top:44px;margin-bottom:24px}
.sec-hd::before{
  content:'';display:block;width:1px;height:30px;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,#c8a05a,transparent);margin:0 auto 14px;
}
.kicker{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.38em;color:#9b7b3a;text-transform:uppercase}
.sec-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(22px,4vw,30px);
  font-weight:600;color:#1c1608;margin-top:7px}
.sec-desc{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:#7a6a4a;margin-top:9px;line-height:1.7}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   PAD SECTIONS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.sec{padding:0 24px 44px}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   MARKET GRID
════════════════════════════════════ */
.market-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:8px}
@media(max-width:520px){.market-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}}
.m-tile{
  background:#ffffff;border:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.18);
  padding:18px 8px;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.m-tile::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
  background:#9b7b3a;transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .3s;
}
.m-tile:hover::after{transform:scaleX(1)}
.m-tile:hover{border-color:rgba(160,120,60,.38)}
.mf{font-size:24px;display:block;margin-bottom:7px}
.mc{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.18em;
  color:#1c1608;text-transform:uppercase;display:block}
.mn{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:10px;color:#a89060;margin-top:4px;line-height:1.4}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   VALUE CARDS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.val-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px}
@media(max-width:520px){.val-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.val-card{
  background:#ffffff;border:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.18);
  padding:22px 20px 22px 24px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.val-card::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:3px;height:100%;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,#9b7b3a,#b89050);
}
.val-icon{
  width:34px;height:34px;border:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.38);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  margin-bottom:12px;color:#9b7b3a;
}
.val-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:600;
  color:#1c1608;margin-bottom:7px}
.val-text{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.75;color:#7a6a4a}
.val-text strong{color:#9b7b3a;font-weight:500}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   PRODUCT CARDS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.prod-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px}
@media(max-width:520px){.prod-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.prod-card{
  background:#ffffff;border:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.18);
  overflow:hidden;position:relative;transition:border-color .3s,box-shadow .3s;cursor:pointer;
}
.prod-card:hover{border-color:rgba(160,120,60,.38);box-shadow:0 2px 20px rgba(120,90,30,.10)}
.prod-img{
  width:100%;aspect-ratio:3/4;display:flex;
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  background:#faf6f0;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.prod-img svg{width:68%}
.prod-mtag{
  position:absolute;top:9px;right:9px;
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:7.5px;letter-spacing:.18em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:#9b7b3a;
  background:#ffffff;border:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.38);padding:3px 7px;
}
.prod-body{padding:14px 13px 16px}
.prod-lbl{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.26em;
  color:#9b7b3a;text-transform:uppercase}
.prod-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:600;
  color:#1c1608;margin-top:3px}
.prod-desc{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:11.5px;color:#7a6a4a;
  margin-top:4px;line-height:1.5}
.prod-moq{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.15em;
  color:#9b7b3a;margin-top:9px;padding-top:9px;border-top:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.18)}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   STATS BAND
════════════════════════════════════ */
.stats{
  margin:0 24px 36px;
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1px 1fr 1px 1fr 1px 1fr;
  background:#ffffff;border:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.18);
}
@media(max-width:480px){
  .stats{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0}
  .st-div{display:none}
  .st-item{border-bottom:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.18)}
}
.st-item{padding:22px 8px;text-align:center}
.st-div{background:rgba(160,120,60,.18)}
.st-num{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:22px;color:#9b7b3a;line-height:1}
.st-lbl{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:9.5px;letter-spacing:.12em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:#a89060;margin-top:5px}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   TIERS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.tier-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px}
@media(max-width:520px){.tier-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.tier-card{
  background:#ffffff;border:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.18);
  padding:24px 18px;position:relative;text-align:center;
}
.tier-card.ft{background:#9b7b3a;border-color:#9b7b3a}
.tier-card.ft .tier-nm,.tier-card.ft .tier-pr,.tier-card.ft .tier-moq,
.tier-card.ft .tier-feats li{color:#f8f4ee}
.tier-card.ft .tier-feats li::before{color:#f8f4ee;opacity:.7}
.tier-bdg{
  position:absolute;top:-10px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:7.5px;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;
  background:#1c1608;color:#c8a05a;
  padding:3px 12px;border:1px solid rgba(191,153,82,.3);white-space:nowrap;
}
.tier-nm{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.28em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:#9b7b3a;margin:10px 0 8px}
.tier-pr{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:700;
  color:#1c1608;line-height:1}
.tier-pr span{font-size:12px;font-weight:400;font-style:italic}
.tier-moq{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:#7a6a4a;margin:6px 0 14px}
.tier-feats{list-style:none;text-align:left}
.tier-feats li{
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:11.5px;color:#7a6a4a;
  padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.18);
  display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:7px;line-height:1.4;
}
.tier-feats li:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.tier-feats li::before{content:'◆';font-size:6px;color:#9b7b3a;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:4px}
.tier-cta{
  display:block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.26em;
  text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;text-decoration:none;
  padding:11px;margin-top:18px;border:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.38);
  color:#9b7b3a;background:transparent;transition:all .3s;
}
.tier-card.ft .tier-cta{background:#f8f4ee;color:#9b7b3a;border-color:transparent}
.tier-cta:hover{background:rgba(155,123,58,.09)}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   INTEL CARDS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.intel-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px}
@media(max-width:520px){.intel-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.intel-card{

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   MERGE HIGHLIGHT BLOCK
════════════════════════════════════ */
.merge-block{
  margin:0 24px 36px;padding:28px 26px;
  background:#ffffff;border:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.18);
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.merge-block::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
  background:#9b7b3a;
}
.merge-block::after{
  content:'✦';position:absolute;top:-10px;left:50%;
  transform:translateX(-50%);background:#f8f4ee;
  padding:0 12px;color:#9b7b3a;font-size:12px;
}
.merge-kicker{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.35em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:#9b7b3a;margin-bottom:12px}
.merge-heading{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:600;
  color:#1c1608;margin-bottom:10px}
.merge-text{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.8;color:#7a6a4a;margin-bottom:8px}
.merge-text strong{color:#1c1608;font-weight:500}
.merge-var{
  display:inline-block;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:12px;
  background:rgba(155,123,58,.09);color:#7a5c28;
  border:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.38);padding:2px 8px;
  font-style:italic;border-radius:2px;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   ABOUT
════════════════════════════════════ */
.about{
  margin:0 24px 36px;padding:30px 26px;

  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.about::after{
  content:'DAROODI';position:absolute;bottom:-8px;right:10px;

}

.about-t{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13.5px;font-weight:300;

.pills{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-top:16px}

  text-transform:uppercase;color:#7a5c28;
  background:rgba(155,123,58,.09);border:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.38);padding:4px 10px;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   CONTACT
════════════════════════════════════ */
.contact{
  margin:0 24px 36px;padding:32px 26px;
  background:#f0e9dc;border:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.18);
  text-align:center;position:relative;
}
.contact::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:#9b7b3a;
}
.contact-h{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:24px;font-weight:600;
  font-style:italic;color:#1c1608;margin-bottom:10px}
.contact-t{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:300;

  max-width:400px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   FINAL CTA
════════════════════════════════════ */
.final{
  margin:0 24px 44px;padding:44px 28px;
  text-align:center;background:#ffffff;
  border:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.18);position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.final::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;

}
.final-q{

      <div class="merge-heading">This email was crafted for your company</div>
      <p class="merge-text">
        We reach out to select trade partners by name because we believe great partnerships
        begin with personal attention. <strong>Ijtiba Rana</strong>, as a buyer or decision-maker
        in <strong>Pakistan</strong>, you are seeing an offer and tier recommendation
        tailored specifically to your market.
      </p>
      <p class="merge-text">
        Your exclusive campaign offer — <em>Wholesale access.</em> — has been prepared with
        your region and boutique profile in mind.
      </p>
      <p class="merge-text" style="margin-top:16px;padding-top:14px;border-top:1px solid rgba(160,120,60,.18);">
        <span style="font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.28em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#9b7b3a;display:block;margin-bottom:10px;">Live Merge Variables</span>
        <span class="merge-var">Ijtiba Rana</span>  
        <span class="merge-var">Growintek (PVT) LTD</span>  
        <span class="merge-var">Pakistan</span>  
        <span class="merge-var">Wholesale access.</span>
      </p>
    </div>

    <!-- ABOUT -->
    <div class="about">
      <div class="about-k">About Daroodi</div>
      <div class="about-h">Three Generations of Embroidery Mastery</div>
      <p class="about-t">
        Daroodi is a house of master artisans specialising in hand-embroidered garments
        rooted in Arabian Peninsula tradition. Founded on the principle that clothing is
        storytelling, every Thobe, Abaya, and ceremonial Coat is a singular work —
        crafted by a named artisan using techniques inherited across generations.
      </p>
      <p class="about-t">
        Our B2B programme exists for <strong>curators of excellence</strong> — partners
        who understand their clients' desire for the rare and the genuine. We are not
        seeking volume. We are seeking the right boutiques to carry these stories.
      </p>
      <div class="pills">
        <span class="pill">Zardozi Embroidery</span>
        <span class="pill">Bisht Craft</span>
        <span class="pill">Thobes</span>
        <span class="pill">Abayas</span>
        <span class="pill">Ceremonial Coats</span>
        <span class="pill">White Label</span>
        <span class="pill">Global Shipping</span>
        <span class="pill">Bespoke Commission</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CONTACT -->
    <div class="contact">
      <div class="contact-h">Start Your Trade Conversation</div>
      <p class="contact-t">
        Ijtiba Rana, our trade desk is ready to discuss how Daroodi can
        complement your company's collection. One conversation is all it takes.
      </p>
      <div class="btn-row">
        <a href="https://wa.me/YOUR_NUMBER" class="btn btn-wa">
          <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path class="wa-path" d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>
          WhatsApp Trade Desk
        </a>
        <a href="#" class="btn btn-p">
          <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
          Trade Enquiry Form
        </a>
        <a href="#" class="btn btn-o">
          <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg>
          Download Catalogue
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- FINAL CTA -->
    <div class="final">
      <p class="final-q">
        "We do not manufacture garments at scale.<br/>
        We create <em>singular pieces</em> that your clients will keep for life."
      </p>
      <p class="final-s">Partnership applications reviewed within 48 hours</p>
      <div class="btn-row">
        <a href="#" class="btn btn-p">Apply for Trade Partnership</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- FOOTER -->
    <footer class="footer">
      <div class="footer-brand">Daroodi</div>
      <div class="footer-sub">Heritage Luxury occasion Wear</div>
      
      <div class="footer-links">
        <a href="#">Apply for Partnership</a>
        <a href="#">Request Call</a>
        <a href="#">Trade Terms</a>
      </div>
      
      <div class="footer-sep"></div>
      
      <div class="footer-legal">
        © 2026 Daroodi Luxury Embroidery House. All rights reserved.<br/>
        You are receiving this direct invitation because of your boutique's premium positioning in your market.<br/>
        <a href="#">Unsubscribe from trade updates</a>
      </div>
    </footer>

  </div>

</div>

</body>
</html>

sentMessages.subject: Invitation to check our collection
sentMessages.body:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" data-theme="light">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Daroodi · B2B Partner Programme</title>
<!--
  ══════════════════════════════════════
  MERGE VARIABLES — inject in Subject or Body
  ══════════════════════════════════════
  Ijtiba Rana         → lead's displayName (fallback: there)
  Growintek (PVT) LTD  → lead's companyName (fallback: your boutique)
  Pakistan → lead's country code / region (e.g. UK)
  Wholesale access.        → Campaign's unique Offer Brief
  ══════════════════════════════════════
-->
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,600&family=Cinzel:wght@400;500;600&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
/* ══════════════════════════════════════
   THEME TOKENS
══════════════════════════════════════ */
:root,[data-theme="light"]{
  --bg:#f8f4ee;--bg-deep:#f0e9dc;--bg-card:#ffffff;--bg-card-alt:#faf6f0;
  --bg-accent:#1a1208;--border:rgba(160,120,60,.18);--border-s:rgba(160,120,60,.38);
  --gold:#9b7b3a;--gold-lt:#c8a05a;--gold-md:#b89050;
  --tx1:#1c1608;--tx2:#3a3020;--txm:#7a6a4a;--txf:#a89060;--txi:#f8f4ee;
  --sh:0 2px 20px rgba(120,90,30,.10);--sh-lg:0 8px 48px rgba(120,90,30,.14);
  --tag-bg:rgba(155,123,58,.09);--tag-c:#7a5c28;
  --div-h:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#c8a05a,transparent);
  --div-v:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,#c8a05a,transparent);
  --pat:.06;--sec-bg:rgba(160,120,60,.04);
}
[data-theme="dark"]{
  --bg:#0c0a07;--bg-deep:#0f0d09;--bg-card:#131008;--bg-card-alt:#100e08;
  --bg-accent:#1e1a0e;--border:rgba(191,153,82,.16);--border-s:rgba(191,153,82,.38);
  --gold:#bf9952;--gold-lt:#d4af6a;--gold-md:#a88840;
  --tx1:#f5edd8;--tx2:#d4c49a;--txm:#9a8b6a;--txf:#6a5e44;--txi:#0c0a07;
  --sh:0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.4);--sh-lg:0 8px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.5);
  --tag-bg:rgba(191,153,82,.10);--tag-c:#bf9952;
  --div-h:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#bf9952,transparent);
  --div-v:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,#bf9952,transparent);
  --pat:.10;--sec-bg:rgba(191,153,82,.03);
}

/* ══ RESET ══ */
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
img,svg{display:block}

/* ══ BODY ══ */
body{
  background:var(--bg-deep);
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;
  color:var(--tx2);
  min-height:100vh;
  padding:0;
  margin:0;
  transition:background .4s,color .4s;
}

/* ══ OUTER SHELL — full-width on mobile, centred on desktop ══ */
.shell{
  width:100%;
  max-width:680px;
  margin:0 auto;
  padding:16px 12px 48px;
  box-sizing:border-box;
}
@media(max-width:380px){
  .shell{padding:12px 8px 40px}
}

/* ══ THEME TOGGLE — sits INSIDE shell, right-aligned, never wraps to column ══ */
.toggle-bar{
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:row;
  flex-wrap:nowrap;
  justify-content:flex-end;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  padding-bottom:8px;
  min-height:32px;
}
.toggle-label{
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.25em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--txf);white-space:nowrap;
  flex-shrink:0;
}
.toggle-pill{
  width:44px;height:22px;min-width:44px;
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border-s);
  border-radius:11px;position:relative;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;
  transition:background .3s,border-color .3s;
}
.toggle-pill::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:3px;left:3px;
  width:14px;height:14px;background:var(--gold);
  border-radius:50%;transition:transform .3s;
}
[data-theme="dark"] .toggle-pill::after{transform:translateX(22px)}
.toggle-icon{font-size:13px;line-height:1;flex-shrink:0}

/* ══ EMAIL WRAPPER ══ */
.ew{
  width:100%;background:var(--bg);position:relative;
  box-shadow:var(--sh-lg);overflow:hidden;
  transition:background .4s,box-shadow .4s;
}
.ew::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  border:1px solid var(--border-s);pointer-events:none;z-index:20;
  transition:border-color .4s;
}
.ew,.ew *{
  transition:background-color .3s ease,color .3s ease,
             border-color .3s ease,box-shadow .3s ease;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   TOP BAR
════════════════════════════════════ */
.top-bar{
  background:var(--gold);padding:7px 24px;
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
  flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;
}
.top-bar-text{
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.25em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--txi);opacity:.9;
}
.top-bar-flags{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center}
.top-bar-flags span{font-size:15px;line-height:1}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   HEADER
════════════════════════════════════ */
.hdr{
  position:relative;background:var(--bg);
  padding:44px 32px 36px;text-align:center;overflow:hidden;
}
.hdr::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:50%;
  transform:translateX(-50%);width:70%;height:1px;
  background:var(--div-h);
}
.corner{position:absolute;width:36px;height:36px}
.c-tl{top:12px;left:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--gold);border-left:1px solid var(--gold)}
.c-tr{top:12px;right:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--gold);border-right:1px solid var(--gold)}
.c-bl{bottom:12px;left:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--gold);border-left:1px solid var(--gold)}
.c-br{bottom:12px;right:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--gold);border-right:1px solid var(--gold)}

.arabesque{display:block;margin:0 auto 14px;opacity:.5}
.brand{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:38px;font-weight:600;
  letter-spacing:.22em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;line-height:1}
.brand-tag{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-style:italic;
  font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--txm);margin-top:8px}
.b2b-badge{
  display:inline-block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8px;
  letter-spacing:.32em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);
  border:1px solid var(--border-s);padding:5px 16px;margin-top:14px;
  background:var(--tag-bg);
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   PERSONALISED GREETING BANNER
════════════════════════════════════ */
.greet-banner{
  background:var(--sec-bg);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:16px 32px;text-align:center;
}
.greet-text{
  font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-style:italic;
  font-size:15px;color:var(--txm);line-height:1.6;
}
.greet-text strong{color:var(--gold);font-style:normal;font-weight:600}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   HERO
════════════════════════════════════ */
.hero{
  position:relative;padding:56px 32px 48px;
  text-align:center;overflow:hidden;background:var(--bg-deep);
}
.hero::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='80' height='80' viewBox='0 0 80 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cg fill='none' stroke='%23c8a05a' stroke-width='0.4'%3E%3Cpath d='M40 8 L72 40 L40 72 L8 40 Z'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='40' cy='40' r='16'/%3E%3Cpath d='M40 8 L40 72 M8 40 L72 40'/%3E%3Cpath d='M40 24 L56 40 L40 56 L24 40 Z'/%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E");
  background-size:80px 80px;opacity:var(--pat);pointer-events:none;
}
.hero-radial{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 40%,rgba(200,160,90,.08) 0%,transparent 65%);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.eyebrow{
  display:inline-block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9.5px;
  letter-spacing:.38em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:20px;position:relative;
}
.eyebrow::before,.eyebrow::after{content:'◆';font-size:6px;margin:0 9px;opacity:.5;vertical-align:middle}
.h1{
  font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(30px,6vw,50px);
  font-weight:700;line-height:1.13;color:var(--tx1);margin-bottom:7px;position:relative;
}
.h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold)}
.h1-sub{
  font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-style:italic;
  font-size:clamp(15px,3vw,20px);color:var(--txm);margin-bottom:26px;position:relative;
}
.div-line{width:72px;height:1px;background:var(--div-h);margin:0 auto 26px}
.hero-body{
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.85;color:var(--txm);max-width:480px;margin:0 auto 32px;position:relative;
}
.hero-body strong{color:var(--tx1);font-weight:500}

/* Offer block */
.offer-block{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border-s);
  border-left:3px solid var(--gold);padding:14px 18px;
  margin:0 auto 28px;max-width:480px;text-align:left;position:relative;
}
.offer-label{
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.3em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:6px;
}
.offer-text{
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:var(--txm);
  line-height:1.6;font-style:italic;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   BUTTONS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.btn-row{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;position:relative}
@media(max-width:400px){
  .btn{font-size:8.5px;padding:12px 16px;letter-spacing:.18em}
  .btn-row{gap:8px}
  .top-bar{padding:7px 12px}
  .top-bar-text{font-size:7.5px;letter-spacing:.18em}
  .hdr{padding:32px 16px 28px}
  .hero{padding:40px 16px 36px}
  .sec{padding:0 12px 36px}
  .merge-block,.about,.contact,.final{margin-left:12px;margin-right:12px}
  .stats{margin:0 12px 28px}
}
.btn{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9.5px;letter-spacing:.28em;
  text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;
  padding:14px 26px;position:relative;transition:all .3s;
  white-space:nowrap;
}
.btn-p{background:var(--gold);color:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--gold)}
.btn-p::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:-4px;border:1px solid rgba(200,160,90,.3)}
.btn-p:hover{background:var(--gold-lt);border-color:var(--gold-lt)}
.btn-o{background:transparent;color:var(--gold);border:1px solid var(--border-s)}
.btn-o:hover{background:var(--tag-bg)}
.btn-wa{background:#15572f;color:#d4f0e0;border:1px solid rgba(21,87,47,.5)}
.btn-wa:hover{background:#1a6b3a}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   SECTION HEADER
════════════════════════════════════ */
.sec-hd{text-align:center;padding-top:44px;margin-bottom:24px}
.sec-hd::before{
  content:'';display:block;width:1px;height:30px;
  background:var(--div-v);margin:0 auto 14px;
}
.kicker{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.38em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase}
.sec-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(22px,4vw,30px);
  font-weight:600;color:var(--tx1);margin-top:7px}
.sec-desc{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:var(--txm);margin-top:9px;line-height:1.7}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   PAD SECTIONS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.sec{padding:0 24px 44px}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   MARKET GRID
════════════════════════════════════ */
.market-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:8px}
@media(max-width:520px){.market-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}}
.m-tile{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:18px 8px;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.m-tile::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
  background:var(--gold);transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .3s;
}
.m-tile:hover::after{transform:scaleX(1)}
.m-tile:hover{border-color:var(--border-s)}
.mf{font-size:24px;display:block;margin-bottom:7px}
.mc{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.18em;
  color:var(--tx1);text-transform:uppercase;display:block}
.mn{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:10px;color:var(--txf);margin-top:4px;line-height:1.4}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   VALUE CARDS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.val-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px}
@media(max-width:520px){.val-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.val-card{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:22px 20px 22px 24px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.val-card::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:3px;height:100%;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--gold),var(--gold-md));
}
.val-icon{
  width:34px;height:34px;border:1px solid var(--border-s);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  margin-bottom:12px;color:var(--gold);
}
.val-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--tx1);margin-bottom:7px}
.val-text{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.75;color:var(--txm)}
.val-text strong{color:var(--gold);font-weight:500}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   PRODUCT CARDS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.prod-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px}
@media(max-width:520px){.prod-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.prod-card{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  overflow:hidden;position:relative;transition:border-color .3s,box-shadow .3s;cursor:pointer;
}
.prod-card:hover{border-color:var(--border-s);box-shadow:var(--sh)}
.prod-img{
  width:100%;aspect-ratio:3/4;display:flex;
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  background:var(--bg-card-alt);position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
[data-theme="light"] .prod-card:nth-child(1) .prod-img{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#f5efe4,#ede4d4)}
[data-theme="light"] .prod-card:nth-child(2) .prod-img{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#f0ebe0,#e8deca)}
[data-theme="light"] .prod-card:nth-child(3) .prod-img{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#f3ede2,#ebe2d0)}
[data-theme="dark"] .prod-card:nth-child(1) .prod-img{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#1a1410,#0e0c08)}
[data-theme="dark"] .prod-card:nth-child(2) .prod-img{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#15110c,#0c0a07)}
[data-theme="dark"] .prod-card:nth-child(3) .prod-img{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#181410,#0f0d09)}
.prod-img svg{width:68%}
.prod-mtag{
  position:absolute;top:9px;right:9px;
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:7.5px;letter-spacing:.18em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border-s);padding:3px 7px;
}
.prod-body{padding:14px 13px 16px}
.prod-lbl{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.26em;
  color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase}
.prod-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--tx1);margin-top:3px}
.prod-desc{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:11.5px;color:var(--txm);
  margin-top:4px;line-height:1.5}
.prod-moq{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.15em;
  color:var(--gold);margin-top:9px;padding-top:9px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   STATS BAND
════════════════════════════════════ */
.stats{
  margin:0 24px 36px;
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1px 1fr 1px 1fr 1px 1fr;
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
}
@media(max-width:480px){
  .stats{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0}
  .st-div{display:none}
  .st-item{border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
}
.st-item{padding:22px 8px;text-align:center}
.st-div{background:var(--border)}
.st-num{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:22px;color:var(--gold);line-height:1}
.st-lbl{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:9.5px;letter-spacing:.12em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--txf);margin-top:5px}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   TIERS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.tier-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px}
@media(max-width:520px){.tier-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.tier-card{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:24px 18px;position:relative;text-align:center;
}
.tier-card.ft{background:var(--gold);border-color:var(--gold)}
.tier-card.ft .tier-nm,.tier-card.ft .tier-pr,.tier-card.ft .tier-moq,
.tier-card.ft .tier-feats li{color:var(--bg)}
.tier-card.ft .tier-feats li::before{color:var(--bg);opacity:.7}
.tier-bdg{
  position:absolute;top:-10px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:7.5px;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;
  background:var(--bg-accent);color:var(--gold-lt);
  padding:3px 12px;border:1px solid rgba(191,153,82,.3);white-space:nowrap;
}
[data-theme="light"] .tier-bdg{background:var(--tx1)}
.tier-nm{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.28em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin:10px 0 8px}
.tier-pr{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:700;
  color:var(--tx1);line-height:1}
.tier-pr span{font-size:12px;font-weight:400;font-style:italic}
.tier-moq{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:var(--txm);margin:6px 0 14px}
.tier-feats{list-style:none;text-align:left}
.tier-feats li{
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:11.5px;color:var(--txm);
  padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:7px;line-height:1.4;
}
.tier-feats li:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.tier-feats li::before{content:'◆';font-size:6px;color:var(--gold);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:4px}
.tier-cta{
  display:block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.26em;
  text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;text-decoration:none;
  padding:11px;margin-top:18px;border:1px solid var(--border-s);
  color:var(--gold);background:transparent;transition:all .3s;
}
.tier-card.ft .tier-cta{background:var(--bg);color:var(--gold);border-color:transparent}
.tier-cta:hover{background:var(--tag-bg)}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   INTEL CARDS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.intel-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px}
@media(max-width:520px){.intel-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.intel-card{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-left:3px solid var(--gold);padding:18px 18px 18px 20px;
}
.intel-region{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;margin-bottom:9px}
.intel-flag{font-size:17px}
.intel-rn{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.28em;
  color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase}
.intel-t{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--tx1);margin-bottom:7px}
.intel-b{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.7;color:var(--txm)}
.intel-b strong{color:var(--gold);font-weight:500}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   MERGE HIGHLIGHT BLOCK
════════════════════════════════════ */
.merge-block{
  margin:0 24px 36px;padding:28px 26px;
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.merge-block::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
  background:var(--gold);
}
.merge-block::after{
  content:'✦';position:absolute;top:-10px;left:50%;
  transform:translateX(-50%);background:var(--bg);
  padding:0 12px;color:var(--gold);font-size:12px;
}
.merge-kicker{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.35em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:12px}
.merge-heading{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--tx1);margin-bottom:10px}
.merge-text{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.8;color:var(--txm);margin-bottom:8px}
.merge-text strong{color:var(--tx1);font-weight:500}
.merge-var{
  display:inline-block;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:12px;
  background:var(--tag-bg);color:var(--tag-c);
  border:1px solid var(--border-s);padding:2px 8px;
  font-style:italic;border-radius:2px;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   ABOUT
════════════════════════════════════ */
.about{
  margin:0 24px 36px;padding:30px 26px;
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.about::after{
  content:'DAROODI';position:absolute;bottom:-8px;right:10px;
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:56px;color:var(--gold);
  opacity:.04;letter-spacing:.1em;pointer-events:none;
}
.about-k{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.38em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:10px}
.about-h{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--tx1);margin-bottom:12px}
.about-t{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13.5px;font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.85;color:var(--txm);margin-bottom:10px}
.pills{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-top:16px}
.pill{
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:7.5px;letter-spacing:.18em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--tag-c);
  background:var(--tag-bg);border:1px solid var(--border-s);padding:4px 10px;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   CONTACT
════════════════════════════════════ */
.contact{
  margin:0 24px 36px;padding:32px 26px;
  background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--border);
  text-align:center;position:relative;
}
.contact::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:var(--gold);
}
.contact-h{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:24px;font-weight:600;
  font-style:italic;color:var(--tx1);margin-bottom:10px}
.contact-t{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.8;color:var(--txm);margin-bottom:22px;
  max-width:400px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   FINAL CTA
════════════════════════════════════ */
.final{
  margin:0 24px 44px;padding:44px 28px;
  text-align:center;background:var(--bg-card);
  border:1px solid var(--border);position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.final::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%,rgba(200,160,90,.07) 0%,transparent 70%);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.final-q{
  font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(16px,3vw,20px);
  font-style:italic;font-weight:400;line-height:1.65;
  color:var(--tx1);margin-bottom:9px;position:relative;
}
.final-q em{color:var(--gold);font-style:normal}
.final-s{
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:10.5px;
  letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--txf);margin-bottom:24px;position:relative;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   FOOTER
════════════════════════════════════ */
.footer{
  background:var(--bg-accent);border-top:1px solid var(--border-s);
  padding:32px 24px;text-align:center;
}
.footer-brand{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:16px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:5px}
.footer-sub{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:11px;font-style:italic;color:var(--txf);margin-bottom:16px}
.footer-links{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:18px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:14px}
.footer-links a{
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:9.5px;letter-spacing:.16em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--txf);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s;
}
.footer-links a:hover{color:var(--gold)}
.footer-sep{width:44px;height:1px;background:var(--border-s);margin:12px auto}
.footer-legal{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:10px;
  color:var(--txf);line-height:1.8;opacity:.65}
.footer-legal a{color:var(--txf);text-decoration:none}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   WA SVG path shorthand
════════════════════════════════════ */
.wa-path{fill:currentColor}

<script>
(function(){
  const pill = document.getElementById('tPill');
  const lbl  = document.getElementById('tLabel');
  const icon = document.getElementById('tIcon');
  const ew   = document.getElementById('ew');
  const html = document.documentElement;

  function set(t){
    html.setAttribute('data-theme', t);
    ew.setAttribute('data-theme', t);
    lbl.textContent  = t==='dark' ? 'Dark Theme'  : 'Light Theme';
    icon.textContent = t==='dark' ? '🌙' : '☀️';
    pill.setAttribute('aria-checked', String(t==='dark'));
    try{ localStorage.setItem('dr-theme', t); }catch(e){}
  }

  pill.addEventListener('click', function(){
    set(html.getAttribute('data-theme')==='dark' ? 'light' : 'dark');
  });
  pill.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){
    if(e.key==='Enter'||e.key===' '){ e.preventDefault(); pill.click(); }
  });

  try{
    var saved = localStorage.getItem('dr-theme');
    if(saved) set(saved);
  }catch(e){}
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" data-theme="light">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
<title>Daroodi · B2B Partner Programme</title>
<!--
  ══════════════════════════════════════
  MERGE VARIABLES — inject in Subject or Body
  ══════════════════════════════════════
  Ijtiba Rana         → lead's displayName (fallback: there)
  Growintek (PVT) LTD  → lead's companyName (fallback: your boutique)
  Pakistan → lead's country code / region (e.g. UK)
  Wholesale access.        → Campaign's unique Offer Brief
  ══════════════════════════════════════
-->
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,600;0,700;1,400;1,600&family=Cinzel:wght@400;500;600&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
/* ══════════════════════════════════════
   THEME TOKENS
══════════════════════════════════════ */
:root,[data-theme="light"]{
  --bg:#f8f4ee;--bg-deep:#f0e9dc;--bg-card:#ffffff;--bg-card-alt:#faf6f0;
  --bg-accent:#1a1208;--border:rgba(160,120,60,.18);--border-s:rgba(160,120,60,.38);
  --gold:#9b7b3a;--gold-lt:#c8a05a;--gold-md:#b89050;
  --tx1:#1c1608;--tx2:#3a3020;--txm:#7a6a4a;--txf:#a89060;--txi:#f8f4ee;
  --sh:0 2px 20px rgba(120,90,30,.10);--sh-lg:0 8px 48px rgba(120,90,30,.14);
  --tag-bg:rgba(155,123,58,.09);--tag-c:#7a5c28;
  --div-h:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#c8a05a,transparent);
  --div-v:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,#c8a05a,transparent);
  --pat:.06;--sec-bg:rgba(160,120,60,.04);
}
[data-theme="dark"]{
  --bg:#0c0a07;--bg-deep:#0f0d09;--bg-card:#131008;--bg-card-alt:#100e08;
  --bg-accent:#1e1a0e;--border:rgba(191,153,82,.16);--border-s:rgba(191,153,82,.38);
  --gold:#bf9952;--gold-lt:#d4af6a;--gold-md:#a88840;
  --tx1:#f5edd8;--tx2:#d4c49a;--txm:#9a8b6a;--txf:#6a5e44;--txi:#0c0a07;
  --sh:0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.4);--sh-lg:0 8px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.5);
  --tag-bg:rgba(191,153,82,.10);--tag-c:#bf9952;
  --div-h:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#bf9952,transparent);
  --div-v:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,#bf9952,transparent);
  --pat:.10;--sec-bg:rgba(191,153,82,.03);
}

/* ══ RESET ══ */
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
img,svg{display:block}

/* ══ BODY ══ */
body{
  background:var(--bg-deep);
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;
  color:var(--tx2);
  min-height:100vh;
  padding:0;
  margin:0;
  transition:background .4s,color .4s;
}

/* ══ OUTER SHELL — full-width on mobile, centred on desktop ══ */
.shell{
  width:100%;
  max-width:680px;
  margin:0 auto;
  padding:16px 12px 48px;
  box-sizing:border-box;
}
@media(max-width:380px){
  .shell{padding:12px 8px 40px}
}

/* ══ THEME TOGGLE — sits INSIDE shell, right-aligned, never wraps to column ══ */
.toggle-bar{
  display:flex;
  flex-direction:row;
  flex-wrap:nowrap;
  justify-content:flex-end;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  padding-bottom:8px;
  min-height:32px;
}
.toggle-label{
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.25em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--txf);white-space:nowrap;
  flex-shrink:0;
}
.toggle-pill{
  width:44px;height:22px;min-width:44px;
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border-s);
  border-radius:11px;position:relative;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;
  transition:background .3s,border-color .3s;
}
.toggle-pill::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:3px;left:3px;
  width:14px;height:14px;background:var(--gold);
  border-radius:50%;transition:transform .3s;
}
[data-theme="dark"] .toggle-pill::after{transform:translateX(22px)}
.toggle-icon{font-size:13px;line-height:1;flex-shrink:0}

/* ══ EMAIL WRAPPER ══ */
.ew{
  width:100%;background:var(--bg);position:relative;
  box-shadow:var(--sh-lg);overflow:hidden;
  transition:background .4s,box-shadow .4s;
}
.ew::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  border:1px solid var(--border-s);pointer-events:none;z-index:20;
  transition:border-color .4s;
}
.ew,.ew *{
  transition:background-color .3s ease,color .3s ease,
             border-color .3s ease,box-shadow .3s ease;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   TOP BAR
════════════════════════════════════ */
.top-bar{
  background:var(--gold);padding:7px 24px;
  display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;
  flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;
}
.top-bar-text{
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.25em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--txi);opacity:.9;
}
.top-bar-flags{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center}
.top-bar-flags span{font-size:15px;line-height:1}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   HEADER
════════════════════════════════════ */
.hdr{
  position:relative;background:var(--bg);
  padding:44px 32px 36px;text-align:center;overflow:hidden;
}
.hdr::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:50%;
  transform:translateX(-50%);width:70%;height:1px;
  background:var(--div-h);
}
.corner{position:absolute;width:36px;height:36px}
.c-tl{top:12px;left:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--gold);border-left:1px solid var(--gold)}
.c-tr{top:12px;right:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--gold);border-right:1px solid var(--gold)}
.c-bl{bottom:12px;left:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--gold);border-left:1px solid var(--gold)}
.c-br{bottom:12px;right:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--gold);border-right:1px solid var(--gold)}

.arabesque{display:block;margin:0 auto 14px;opacity:.5}
.brand{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:38px;font-weight:600;
  letter-spacing:.22em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;line-height:1}
.brand-tag{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-style:italic;
  font-size:13px;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--txm);margin-top:8px}
.b2b-badge{
  display:inline-block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8px;
  letter-spacing:.32em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);
  border:1px solid var(--border-s);padding:5px 16px;margin-top:14px;
  background:var(--tag-bg);
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   PERSONALISED GREETING BANNER
════════════════════════════════════ */
.greet-banner{
  background:var(--sec-bg);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:16px 32px;text-align:center;
}
.greet-text{
  font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-style:italic;
  font-size:15px;color:var(--txm);line-height:1.6;
}
.greet-text strong{color:var(--gold);font-style:normal;font-weight:600}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   HERO
════════════════════════════════════ */
.hero{
  position:relative;padding:56px 32px 48px;
  text-align:center;overflow:hidden;background:var(--bg-deep);
}
.hero::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='80' height='80' viewBox='0 0 80 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cg fill='none' stroke='%23c8a05a' stroke-width='0.4'%3E%3Cpath d='M40 8 L72 40 L40 72 L8 40 Z'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='40' cy='40' r='16'/%3E%3Cpath d='M40 8 L40 72 M8 40 L72 40'/%3E%3Cpath d='M40 24 L56 40 L40 56 L24 40 Z'/%3E%3C/g%3E%3C/svg%3E");
  background-size:80px 80px;opacity:var(--pat);pointer-events:none;
}
.hero-radial{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 40%,rgba(200,160,90,.08) 0%,transparent 65%);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.eyebrow{
  display:inline-block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9.5px;
  letter-spacing:.38em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:20px;position:relative;
}
.eyebrow::before,.eyebrow::after{content:'◆';font-size:6px;margin:0 9px;opacity:.5;vertical-align:middle}
.h1{
  font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(30px,6vw,50px);
  font-weight:700;line-height:1.13;color:var(--tx1);margin-bottom:7px;position:relative;
}
.h1 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold)}
.h1-sub{
  font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-style:italic;
  font-size:clamp(15px,3vw,20px);color:var(--txm);margin-bottom:26px;position:relative;
}
.div-line{width:72px;height:1px;background:var(--div-h);margin:0 auto 26px}
.hero-body{
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.85;color:var(--txm);max-width:480px;margin:0 auto 32px;position:relative;
}
.hero-body strong{color:var(--tx1);font-weight:500}

/* Offer block */
.offer-block{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border-s);
  border-left:3px solid var(--gold);padding:14px 18px;
  margin:0 auto 28px;max-width:480px;text-align:left;position:relative;
}
.offer-label{
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.3em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:6px;
}
.offer-text{
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:var(--txm);
  line-height:1.6;font-style:italic;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   BUTTONS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.btn-row{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;position:relative}
@media(max-width:400px){
  .btn{font-size:8.5px;padding:12px 16px;letter-spacing:.18em}
  .btn-row{gap:8px}
  .top-bar{padding:7px 12px}
  .top-bar-text{font-size:7.5px;letter-spacing:.18em}
  .hdr{padding:32px 16px 28px}
  .hero{padding:40px 16px 36px}
  .sec{padding:0 12px 36px}
  .merge-block,.about,.contact,.final{margin-left:12px;margin-right:12px}
  .stats{margin:0 12px 28px}
}
.btn{
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9.5px;letter-spacing:.28em;
  text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;
  padding:14px 26px;position:relative;transition:all .3s;
  white-space:nowrap;
}
.btn-p{background:var(--gold);color:var(--bg);border:1px solid var(--gold)}
.btn-p::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:-4px;border:1px solid rgba(200,160,90,.3)}
.btn-p:hover{background:var(--gold-lt);border-color:var(--gold-lt)}
.btn-o{background:transparent;color:var(--gold);border:1px solid var(--border-s)}
.btn-o:hover{background:var(--tag-bg)}
.btn-wa{background:#15572f;color:#d4f0e0;border:1px solid rgba(21,87,47,.5)}
.btn-wa:hover{background:#1a6b3a}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   SECTION HEADER
════════════════════════════════════ */
.sec-hd{text-align:center;padding-top:44px;margin-bottom:24px}
.sec-hd::before{
  content:'';display:block;width:1px;height:30px;
  background:var(--div-v);margin:0 auto 14px;
}
.kicker{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.38em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase}
.sec-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(22px,4vw,30px);
  font-weight:600;color:var(--tx1);margin-top:7px}
.sec-desc{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;color:var(--txm);margin-top:9px;line-height:1.7}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   PAD SECTIONS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.sec{padding:0 24px 44px}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   MARKET GRID
════════════════════════════════════ */
.market-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);gap:8px}
@media(max-width:520px){.market-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}}
.m-tile{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:18px 8px;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.m-tile::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
  background:var(--gold);transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .3s;
}
.m-tile:hover::after{transform:scaleX(1)}
.m-tile:hover{border-color:var(--border-s)}
.mf{font-size:24px;display:block;margin-bottom:7px}
.mc{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.18em;
  color:var(--tx1);text-transform:uppercase;display:block}
.mn{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:10px;color:var(--txf);margin-top:4px;line-height:1.4}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   VALUE CARDS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.val-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:12px}
@media(max-width:520px){.val-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.val-card{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:22px 20px 22px 24px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.val-card::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;width:3px;height:100%;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--gold),var(--gold-md));
}
.val-icon{
  width:34px;height:34px;border:1px solid var(--border-s);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  margin-bottom:12px;color:var(--gold);
}
.val-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--tx1);margin-bottom:7px}
.val-text{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.75;color:var(--txm)}
.val-text strong{color:var(--gold);font-weight:500}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   PRODUCT CARDS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.prod-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px}
@media(max-width:520px){.prod-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.prod-card{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  overflow:hidden;position:relative;transition:border-color .3s,box-shadow .3s;cursor:pointer;
}
.prod-card:hover{border-color:var(--border-s);box-shadow:var(--sh)}
.prod-img{
  width:100%;aspect-ratio:3/4;display:flex;
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  background:var(--bg-card-alt);position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
[data-theme="light"] .prod-card:nth-child(1) .prod-img{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#f5efe4,#ede4d4)}
[data-theme="light"] .prod-card:nth-child(2) .prod-img{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#f0ebe0,#e8deca)}
[data-theme="light"] .prod-card:nth-child(3) .prod-img{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#f3ede2,#ebe2d0)}
[data-theme="dark"] .prod-card:nth-child(1) .prod-img{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#1a1410,#0e0c08)}
[data-theme="dark"] .prod-card:nth-child(2) .prod-img{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#15110c,#0c0a07)}
[data-theme="dark"] .prod-card:nth-child(3) .prod-img{background:linear-gradient(145deg,#181410,#0f0d09)}
.prod-img svg{width:68%}
.prod-mtag{
  position:absolute;top:9px;right:9px;
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:7.5px;letter-spacing:.18em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border-s);padding:3px 7px;
}
.prod-body{padding:14px 13px 16px}
.prod-lbl{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.26em;
  color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase}
.prod-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--tx1);margin-top:3px}
.prod-desc{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:11.5px;color:var(--txm);
  margin-top:4px;line-height:1.5}
.prod-moq{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.15em;
  color:var(--gold);margin-top:9px;padding-top:9px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   STATS BAND
════════════════════════════════════ */
.stats{
  margin:0 24px 36px;
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1px 1fr 1px 1fr 1px 1fr;
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
}
@media(max-width:480px){
  .stats{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0}
  .st-div{display:none}
  .st-item{border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
}
.st-item{padding:22px 8px;text-align:center}
.st-div{background:var(--border)}
.st-num{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:22px;color:var(--gold);line-height:1}
.st-lbl{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:9.5px;letter-spacing:.12em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--txf);margin-top:5px}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   TIERS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.tier-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:10px}
@media(max-width:520px){.tier-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.tier-card{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:24px 18px;position:relative;text-align:center;
}
.tier-card.ft{background:var(--gold);border-color:var(--gold)}
.tier-card.ft .tier-nm,.tier-card.ft .tier-pr,.tier-card.ft .tier-moq,
.tier-card.ft .tier-feats li{color:var(--bg)}
.tier-card.ft .tier-feats li::before{color:var(--bg);opacity:.7}
.tier-bdg{
  position:absolute;top:-10px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:7.5px;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;
  background:var(--bg-accent);color:var(--gold-lt);
  padding:3px 12px;border:1px solid rgba(191,153,82,.3);white-space:nowrap;
}
[data-theme="light"] .tier-bdg{background:var(--tx1)}
.tier-nm{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.28em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin:10px 0 8px}
.tier-pr{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:700;
  color:var(--tx1);line-height:1}
.tier-pr span{font-size:12px;font-weight:400;font-style:italic}
.tier-moq{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:11px;color:var(--txm);margin:6px 0 14px}
.tier-feats{list-style:none;text-align:left}
.tier-feats li{
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:11.5px;color:var(--txm);
  padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:7px;line-height:1.4;
}
.tier-feats li:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.tier-feats li::before{content:'◆';font-size:6px;color:var(--gold);flex-shrink:0;margin-top:4px}
.tier-cta{
  display:block;font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.26em;
  text-transform:uppercase;text-align:center;text-decoration:none;
  padding:11px;margin-top:18px;border:1px solid var(--border-s);
  color:var(--gold);background:transparent;transition:all .3s;
}
.tier-card.ft .tier-cta{background:var(--bg);color:var(--gold);border-color:transparent}
.tier-cta:hover{background:var(--tag-bg)}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   INTEL CARDS
════════════════════════════════════ */
.intel-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px}
@media(max-width:520px){.intel-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}}
.intel-card{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-left:3px solid var(--gold);padding:18px 18px 18px 20px;
}
.intel-region{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;margin-bottom:9px}
.intel-flag{font-size:17px}
.intel-rn{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.28em;
  color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase}
.intel-t{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--tx1);margin-bottom:7px}
.intel-b{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.7;color:var(--txm)}
.intel-b strong{color:var(--gold);font-weight:500}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   MERGE HIGHLIGHT BLOCK
════════════════════════════════════ */
.merge-block{
  margin:0 24px 36px;padding:28px 26px;
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.merge-block::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;
  background:var(--gold);
}
.merge-block::after{
  content:'✦';position:absolute;top:-10px;left:50%;
  transform:translateX(-50%);background:var(--bg);
  padding:0 12px;color:var(--gold);font-size:12px;
}
.merge-kicker{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.35em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:12px}
.merge-heading{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--tx1);margin-bottom:10px}
.merge-text{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.8;color:var(--txm);margin-bottom:8px}
.merge-text strong{color:var(--tx1);font-weight:500}
.merge-var{
  display:inline-block;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:12px;
  background:var(--tag-bg);color:var(--tag-c);
  border:1px solid var(--border-s);padding:2px 8px;
  font-style:italic;border-radius:2px;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   ABOUT
════════════════════════════════════ */
.about{
  margin:0 24px 36px;padding:30px 26px;
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.about::after{
  content:'DAROODI';position:absolute;bottom:-8px;right:10px;
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:56px;color:var(--gold);
  opacity:.04;letter-spacing:.1em;pointer-events:none;
}
.about-k{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.38em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:10px}
.about-h{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--tx1);margin-bottom:12px}
.about-t{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:13.5px;font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.85;color:var(--txm);margin-bottom:10px}
.pills{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-top:16px}
.pill{
  font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:7.5px;letter-spacing:.18em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--tag-c);
  background:var(--tag-bg);border:1px solid var(--border-s);padding:4px 10px;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   CONTACT
════════════════════════════════════ */
.contact{
  margin:0 24px 36px;padding:32px 26px;
  background:var(--bg-deep);border:1px solid var(--border);
  text-align:center;position:relative;
}
.contact::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:var(--gold);
}
.contact-h{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:24px;font-weight:600;
  font-style:italic;color:var(--tx1);margin-bottom:10px}
.contact-t{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:300;
  line-height:1.8;color:var(--txm);margin-bottom:22px;
  max-width:400px;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   FINAL CTA
════════════════════════════════════ */
.final{
  margin:0 24px 44px;padding:44px 28px;
  text-align:center;background:var(--bg-card);
  border:1px solid var(--border);position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.final::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 50%,rgba(200,160,90,.07) 0%,transparent 70%);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.final-q{
  font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(16px,3vw,20px);
  font-style:italic;font-weight:400;line-height:1.65;
  color:var(--tx1);margin-bottom:9px;position:relative;
}
.final-q em{color:var(--gold);font-style:normal}
.final-s{
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:10.5px;
  letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--txf);margin-bottom:24px;position:relative;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   FOOTER
════════════════════════════════════ */
.footer{
  background:var(--bg-accent);border-top:1px solid var(--border-s);
  padding:32px 24px;text-align:center;
}
.footer-brand{font-family:'Cinzel',serif;font-size:16px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:5px}
.footer-sub{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:11px;font-style:italic;color:var(--txf);margin-bottom:16px}
.footer-links{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:18px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:14px}
.footer-links a{
  font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:9.5px;letter-spacing:.16em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--txf);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s;
}
.footer-links a:hover{color:var(--gold)}
.footer-sep{width:44px;height:1px;background:var(--border-s);margin:12px auto}
.footer-legal{font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:10px;
  color:var(--txf);line-height:1.8;opacity:.65}
.footer-legal a{color:var(--txf);text-decoration:none}

/* ════════════════════════════════════
   WA SVG path shorthand
════════════════════════════════════ */
.wa-path{fill:currentColor}

<script>
(function(){
  const pill = document.getElementById('tPill');
  const lbl  = document.getElementById('tLabel');
  const icon = document.getElementById('tIcon');
  const ew   = document.getElementById('ew');
  const html = document.documentElement;

  function set(t){
    html.setAttribute('data-theme', t);
    ew.setAttribute('data-theme', t);
    lbl.textContent  = t==='dark' ? 'Dark Theme'  : 'Light Theme';
    icon.textContent = t==='dark' ? '🌙' : '☀️';
    pill.setAttribute('aria-checked', String(t==='dark'));
    try{ localStorage.setItem('dr-theme', t); }catch(e){}
  }

  pill.addEventListener('click', function(){
    set(html.getAttribute('data-theme')==='dark' ? 'light' : 'dark');
  });
  pill.addEventListener('keydown', function(e){
    if(e.key==='Enter'||e.key===' '){ e.preventDefault(); pill.click(); }
  });

  try{
    var saved = localStorage.getItem('dr-theme');
    if(saved) set(saved);
  }catch(e){}
})();
</script>
